system.description: This one never gets old. When somebody or something does something worth seeing again, applaud and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
the target enters a loop, repeating its exact behavior over the last five to sixty seconds, for 20 minutes. If the target is conscious, they do not remember being in the loop: every time the loop restarts, their memory is reset to its state at the loop’s beginning.

Though the target’s memory resets, the world around them proceeds through time as normal. For example, if they’ve been looped just before they intend to staple a document, soon that document will have dozens of staples in it.
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • Up to three additional people or objects join the loop
  • The loop covers up to an additional minute
  • The loop repeats for an additional 20 minutes
outcomes.failure: the target disappears instead: you’ve disconnected them from the timeline. They will appear sporadically, rejoining the timeline for up to a minute at a time at seemingly random intervals. In the meanwhile, they understand what you’ve done, and may eventually learn to use this state to their advantage.
